prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG M297.2** (4.0L V8 Biturbo) with a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (1.4 bar boost) and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (12.5:1 compression) paired with **Manley Performance titanium valves** and **Ferrea Racing 6000-series valve springs** for 1,050 HP at 7,800 RPM on **VP Racing Fuels Q16** (118 octane).

Installation of a **Weistec Engineering W4A 900 8-speed AMG Speedshift transmission** with a **PUK Racing billet torque converter** (3,800 RPM stall) and **South Bend Clutch dual-disc carbon/carbon clutch** for 1,200 Nm torque capacity.

Full **HGP Turbo Systems** big-turbo kit with **Precision Turbo 6266 ball-bearing turbos**, **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates**, **AEM Infinity 10 ECU** (standalone), and **Nitrous Express Gen-X direct-port nitrous system** (150-shot progressive controller) for an additional 200 HP on demand.
estetica: **RML Group** carbon-fiber widebody conversion with **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** front/rear overfenders (30mm wider track) and **Vorsteiner V-FF107** forged 21x12.5 ET25 wheels (Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires).

**AMS Performance** custom front splitter with **Gurney flap** and **Active Aero** rear wing (DTM-style, 1,200mm span) with **Bosch Motorsport** hydraulic actuators for dynamic angle adjustment (0-15 degrees).

**VMR Design** titanium exhaust system with **Akrapović 4-2-1 headers**, **REMUS Sport Cats (100-cell)**, and **Burns Stainless 3.5-inch dual outlets** (ceramic-coated, 304-grade stainless) for a 9,500 RPM redline crackle tune.
